name: ABNORMAL FIRST TRIMESTER FINDINGS
chapter: DIFFERENTIAL DIAGNOSIS OF OBSTETRIC AND GYNECOLOGIC
definition: VAGINAL BLEEDING IN FIRST TRIMESTER hemorrhage in cul-de-sac (= rectouterine pouch) normal pelvic US = transient state of early pregnancy during which no definite IUP is positive β-hCG without IUP

demographics.Frequency: 15-25% of all pregnancies, of which 50% terminate in abortion

discriminating_features: synechia often thins during uterine stretching + disappears as pregnancy progresses

general: synechia often thins during uterine stretching + disappears as pregnancy progresses
